commands: vp create vite:generator --no-interactive --directory tools/my-generator # scaffold a Bingo generator inside a monorepo
cat tools/my-generator/package.json # bingo-template keyword + bingo dependency mark it as a generator
vp create my-generator --no-interactive -- --name demo-pkg --directory demo-pkg --offline # run the generator through vp create (appends --skip-requests)
cat tools/demo-pkg/package.json # package generated by the Bingo template
